per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identified isopropanol and hydrogen peroxide but did not provide detailed chemical structures or justification.
The student did not specify any reaction conditions, missing an opportunity to clarify their impact on the mechanism.
The student mentioned explaining the reaction steps but lacked detail on intermediates and transition states.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding by missing critical reaction conditions and providing vague explanations of reaction components and pathways.
